title: Q&A About My Work At Oracle's Java Platform Group
summary: Answers to the remaining questions that didn't fit into Inside Java Newscast #100
content:
Answers to the remaining questions that didn't fit into Inside Java Newscast #100

To celebrate the 100th episode of the Inside Java Newscast, I answered your questions about the show and the team behind it. Not all answers made it into the jubilee episode and so here are the remaining ones:

  • 0:00 Intro
  • 0:23 "Where do you live and how do you work together?"
  • 2:31 "How do you engage the community?"
  • 3:29 "What's your background and do you code?"
  • 5:24 "Will we see you again at Jfokus?"
  • 5:45 "Will you resume posting on Twitter?"
  • 6:01 "Will AI have an impact on you reaching your audience?"

Inside Java Newscast #100, with the first half of the questions - in case you haven't watched it:

Embedded video.

Watch the video.
